stories.headline: Anthropic just entered Elon Musk's entire SpaceX compute infrastructure
stories.blurb: Claude's usage limits are going up across paid tiers, and Anthropic signed a compute deal with SpaceX to tap into its infrastructure. The partnership gives Anthropic access to SpaceX's hardware for training and inference while SpaceX gets enterprise-grade AI tools for engineering and operations.
stories.why_it_matters: SpaceX's compute cluster could help Anthropic scale without building everything in-house.
stories.original_headline: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX

stories.headline: Meta's SAM 3.1 can now track objects across video in real time
stories.blurb: Meta released SAM 3.1, an updated computer vision model that tracks and segments objects across video frames as they happen. The new version runs faster than its predecessor and uses two new techniques — multiplexing (processing multiple objects simultaneously) and global reasoning (understanding relationships between objects across the entire scene) — to handle complex videos with many moving parts.
stories.why_it_matters: Real-time video understanding just got more practical for apps that need to follow multiple things at once.
stories.original_headline: SAM 3.1: Faster and More Accessible Real-Time Video Detection and Tracking With Multiplexing and Global Reasoning

try_this_prompt.title: The jargon translator
try_this_prompt.prompt: I'm about to paste something I wrote that uses too much insider language. Rewrite it so someone two levels away from my daily work can understand it in one read. Keep the stakes and specifics. Cut every term that needs a glossary. If you have to explain what something is, I used jargon.
try_this_prompt.tool_hint: Before sending anything outside your immediate team.

daily_question: If you could run one AI model on a supercomputer for 24 hours, what would you build?
notes: Pool is heavy on lab research papers (Muse Spark architecture, DiLoCo training), infrastructure partnerships (SpaceX compute, Korea deal), and enterprise packages without clear try-it hooks (Claude Small Business connectors). Scout correctly identified gaps: no mobile agents, coding tools, or consumer productivity wins shipped. Search found hints of ChatGPT finance and Codex mobile but couldn't retrieve full articles. Top-scoring available stories are technical model releases (SAM 3.1) and infrastructure news (Anthropic-SpaceX). Shipping 2 stories: SAM 3.1 real-time video detection and Anthropic-SpaceX higher Claude limits. Adjustments: Skipping beginner slot. Shipping engineer (SAM 3.1 video detection) + business (Anthropic-SpaceX compute/limits) as strongest available. Both Tier 1, concrete hooks, different vendors.
